description: Helped dozens of DTC brands scale their direct-to-consumer revenues by setting up robust server-side analytics pipelines (GA4/GTM) and running performance campaigns across Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads. Successfully managed client ad budgets resulting in outstanding CPA reductions and ROAS growth.

Formulated creative testing processes, managed high-budget client advertising channels, and worked closely with copywriters and designers to produce high-impact performance creatives. Conducted comprehensive attribution audits to secure highly accurate budget reporting.

Spearheaded custom integration projects mapping pixel APIs and server-side tracking matrices. Maintained robust reporting setups using Looker Studio and ensured full alignment between customer databases, GA4 events, and paid marketing pipelines.
Maintained day-to-day operations for social media ad platforms, conducted audience research, monitored CPC and impression trends, and produced weekly metrics dashboards for brand stakeholders.
